title: Fractional CMO
description: Senior growth leadership for founders who need sharper decisions, better sequencing, and a repeatable growth system before hiring a full-time CMO.
audience: Best for Seed to Series B teams that need strategic leadership without adding another agency layer.
promise: You get a senior operator in the room for strategy, prioritisation, team direction, and execution quality.
outcomes: Founder messaging and investor narrative support
Team rituals that keep growth moving
process: Diagnose current constraints and team capacity
Set quarterly growth priorities and decision rules
Guide execution across research, campaigns, and conversion
Document the system so the team gets stronger over time
